summary: Comprehensive testing of Zitex Payment APIs, Credit Deduction Logic, Mobile Chat UI, and Payment Page completed. All backend tests (14/14) passed. Fixed bug: notify_owner function was undefined, changed to send_whatsapp_notification. Frontend tests verified mobile chat UI with hamburger menu, tools bar at bottom, and payment page with PayPal integration.
passed_tests: API POST /api/payments/create-order - Requires authentication (401/403)
API POST /api/payments/create-order - Creates order for starter credits package with PAYPAL-XXXXXXXX format
API POST /api/payments/create-order - Creates order for pro credits package
API POST /api/payments/create-order - Returns 400 for invalid package
API POST /api/payments/create-order - Creates order for subscription (images_monthly)
API POST /api/payments/capture-order - Requires authentication (401/403)
API POST /api/payments/capture-order - Returns 404 for non-existent order
API POST /api/payments/capture-order - Successfully adds credits after payment
API POST /api/payments/capture-order - Applies first purchase bonus (50 points)
API GET /api/payments/history - Requires authentication
API GET /api/payments/history - Returns user's payment orders
Credit deduction - Owner user (is_owner=true) doesn't get credits deducted
Credit deduction - Service costs defined in pricing (image=5, video_4s=10, video_12s=25, video_60s=100)
Credit deduction - User balance endpoint includes service_costs
Frontend - Mobile chat page loads with hamburger menu button visible
Frontend - Mobile chat has TTS toggle button in tools bar
Frontend - Mobile chat has Settings button in tools bar
Frontend - Mobile chat has chat input, send button, microphone button
Frontend - Payment page loads with order summary
Frontend - Payment page shows package name (باقة المبتدئ)
Frontend - Payment page shows price in SAR (50 ر.س) and USD ($13)
Frontend - Payment page shows PayPal option with PayPal buttons
Frontend - Payment page shows security badge
Frontend - Payment page shows credit card option (disabled - coming soon)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all mobile chat UI and payment page features working)

seed_data_creation: Multiple TEST_ prefixed users created during payment flow tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Payment APIs fully functional. /api/payments/create-order creates mock PayPal orders (PAYPAL-XXXXXXXX format). /api/payments/capture-order processes payment and adds credits with first purchase bonus. Credit deduction logic in ai_chat_service.py properly checks: 1) is_owner (no charge), 2) free_images/free_videos, 3) subscription, 4) credits. Mobile chat UI has hamburger menu, TTS toggle, settings button in tools bar at bottom. Payment page shows order summary with PayPal integration.
mocked_apis: PayPal API (sandbox/mock mode - creates mock order IDs PAYPAL-XXXXXXXX)

payment_create_order.details: Creates PayPal order with mock ID (PAYPAL-XXXXXXXX format), stores in payment_orders collection

payment_capture_order.details: Captures payment, adds credits to user, applies first purchase bonus (50 points)

credit_deduction_logic.details: Checks owner status, free credits, subscription, then deducts from credits balance

mobile_chat_ui.hamburger_menu: Working - visible when sidebar is closed
mobile_chat_ui.tools_bar_bottom: Working - contains TTS toggle, settings button
mobile_chat_ui.chat_input: Working - with send and microphone buttons

payment_page.order_summary: Working - shows package name, credits, price in SAR/USD

bug_fixed.description: notify_owner function was called but not defined in server.py
bug_fixed.fix: Changed notify_owner to send_whatsapp_notification (the correct function name)
